## Results

```{r}
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 6
#| dpi: 320

pmm_results_plot_data <- MplusAutomation::readModels(
  here::here("mplus_output", "pmm_103", "pmm_hcap_103b.out")
)[["savedata"]] %>%
  tibble::as_tibble() %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  dplyr::select(id, cprob1, cprob2, cprob3) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(cprob1), dplyr::desc(cprob2), dplyr::desc(cprob3)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(participant_number = dplyr::row_number()) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(cprob1, cprob2, cprob3),
    names_to = "class",
    values_to = "probability"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    class = factor(
      class,
      levels = c("cprob1", "cprob2", "cprob3"),
      labels = c("Normal", "MCI", "Dementia")
    )
  )

participant_count <- dplyr::n_distinct(pmm_results_plot_data$participant_number)
x_axis_title <- stringr::str_glue("Participant number (N = {scales::comma(participant_count)})")

pmm_results_plot_base <- ggplot(
  pmm_results_plot_data,
  aes(x = participant_number, y = probability, fill = class)
) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Normal" = "#efedf5", "MCI" = "#bcbddc", "Dementia" = "#756bb1")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(x_axis_title, breaks = NULL, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    "Probability of class membership",
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(title = NULL, nrow = 1))

pmm_results_plot_slide <- pmm_results_plot_base +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = 8),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 20, 10, 10)
  )

pmm_results_plot_export <- pmm_results_plot_base +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 5.5) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 4.8),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 7.2, margin = margin(t = 4)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 7.2, margin = margin(r = 4)),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 5.6),
    legend.key.size = grid::unit(0.12, "in"),
    legend.box.margin = margin(t = 2),
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    plot.margin = margin(4, 6, 4, 4)
  )

pdf_output_path <- here::here("Figures", "Slides2603_results_class_probabilities.pdf")
png_output_path <- here::here("Figures", "Slides2603_results_class_probabilities.png")

ggplot2::ggsave(
  filename = pdf_output_path,
  plot = pmm_results_plot_export,
  width = 4,
  height = 3,
  units = "in",
  device = grDevices::cairo_pdf
)

system2(
  command = "sips",
  args = c(
    "-s", "format", "png",
    "--resampleWidth", "2400",
    "--resampleHeight", "1800",
    pdf_output_path,
    "--out", png_output_path
  ),
  stdout = FALSE,
  stderr = FALSE
)

pmm_results_plot_slide
```
